brief: Today's headlines span ICE custody deaths in Mexico, Todd Blanche's confirmation hurdle, Canada wildfire health risks, Ukraine's defense minister dismissal, and a Cyclospora outbreak, while research explores multimodal emotion analysis, human-AI interaction, and misinformation detection.
news_summary: Mexico formally requests US state investigations into immigrant ICE deaths; Todd Blanche's nomination faces a critical Senate vote. Other major stories include Canada wildfire and heat health risks, Ukraine's defense minister ouster, Cyclospora outbreak, Texas flash floods, and global favorability shift towards China.
papers_summary: New papers introduce Cross-Domain Multimodal Emotion Descriptor (CD-MED) for digital objects, GraphPolaris for graph database visualization, Aïra for interdisciplinary AI research assistants, and studies on health misinformation in low-resource languages, listener nodding generation, human-robot gaze, and playful AI in email.

en.brief: Today's headlines span ICE custody deaths in Mexico, Todd Blanche's confirmation hurdle, Canada wildfire health risks, Ukraine's defense minister dismissal, and a Cyclospora outbreak, while research explores multimodal emotion analysis, human-AI interaction, and misinformation detection.
en.news_summary: Mexico formally requests US state investigations into immigrant ICE deaths; Todd Blanche's nomination faces a critical Senate vote. Other major stories include Canada wildfire and heat health risks, Ukraine's defense minister ouster, Cyclospora outbreak, Texas flash floods, and global favorability shift towards China.
en.papers_summary: New papers introduce Cross-Domain Multimodal Emotion Descriptor (CD-MED) for digital objects, GraphPolaris for graph database visualization, Aïra for interdisciplinary AI research assistants, and studies on health misinformation in low-resource languages, listener nodding generation, human-robot gaze, and playful AI in email.

zh.brief: 今日新聞涵蓋香港書店搜查、中國經濟放緩及霸王龍化石拍賣；論文方面則聚焦AI跨學科研究助手與低資源語言健康錯誤資訊。
zh.news_summary: 香港國安搜查獨立書店逮捕5人；中國第二季度GDP增長放緩至4.3%；霸王龍化石以5010萬美元成交創紀錄。
zh.papers_summary: 無中文論文，英文論文探討AI研究助手在跨學科科學中的應用，以及低資源語言（如孟加拉語）的健康錯誤資訊檢測。

todays_image.caption: Both the lifeboat patent and the ICE death investigation involve attempts to prevent or address failures in systems designed to save lives in perilous situations.
todays_image.title: Patent Model, Life Boat
